name: The Permission Nightmare (v2)
title: The Permission Nightmare (v2)
description: Experience the nightmare of maintaining complex permission queries, see how ERB simplifies it, and understand both the benefits AND failure modes - with evidence
author: ERB Team

scenes.title: Permission Problems: Measured, Not Claimed
scenes.summary:
Complex permission queries scattered across your codebase are a maintenance nightmare.

With ERB:
  - One policy: project.owner_principal = current_user.id
  - Generated to all substrates
  - Conformance tested on every commit

We don't eliminate bugs. We make them DETECTABLE.
lessons: Legacy: N systems = N places to update, risk unquantified
ERB: 1 definition, risk measured via conformance tests
Centralization reduces drift but amplifies policy mistakes
Conformance tests catch mistakes BEFORE deployment
The honest claim: measurable consistency, not perfection
